allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from app.main import app; print\('OK: all routers loaded'\); [print\(f'  {r.path} [{\\",\\".join\(r.methods\)}]'\) for r in app.routes if hasattr\(r, 'path'\) and \('/dashboard' in r.path or '/geofence' in r.path or '/weekly' in r.path or '/attendance-logs' in r.path or '/exceptions' in r.path\)]")
